title: Deyeuxia elongata

intro: Deyeuxia elongata is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family, commonly found in mountainous regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. The bioactive constituents of Deyeuxia elongata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal activities. In traditional Chinese medicine, Deyeuxia elongata is commonly used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in the production of herbal granules and capsules.
